parameters.query:
INSERT INTO otp_challenges (incident_id, otp_code, phone)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
ON CONFLICT (incident_id) DO UPDATE SET
  otp_code   = EXCLUDED.otp_code,
  expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes',
  used       = FALSE;

SELECT incident_id, otp_code, phone, expires_at
FROM otp_challenges
WHERE otp_code = $1
  AND used = FALSE
  AND expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.query:
UPDATE otp_challenges
SET used = TRUE
WHERE otp_code = $1
  AND incident_id = $2;
